route_split.not_this_suite: GL curriculum learning or skill-package generalization

experiments.design: Punishment-dominant later evidence overrides a rewarded same-token positive payload by deriving repair context.
Reloaded authoritative memory restores state B recall, C successor prediction, and short-term-slot memory objects.
Disable only the negative-text detector and verify punished raw text leaks back into positive payload.
Stable focus, interruption, and return should create observable interruption/resumption traces while slot packets keep narrative energy online.
A multi-component query should be absorbed over multiple B rounds rather than reduced to a single winner.
Lag-shaped successor energy should have a next-tick peak; disabling lag shaping should flatten the distribution.
Higher cognitive pressure should shift action competition toward reread / replace / replay and away from direct commit; removing pressure anchors or mismatch evidence should weaken the effect.

Two pressure sweeps should show the same underlying shape in both clean and stressed regimes: clean drafts stay commit-dominant while commit weakens with pressure, and stressed drafts shift toward replay / revision as pressure rises.
